title: scutellaria bolanderi
intro: Scutellaria bolanderi, also known as Bolander's skullcap or Bolander's scullcap, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family. It is primarily used in herbal medicine for its potential medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and supporting immune function. Scutellaria bolanderi is often prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or capsules for consumption, and it can also be used topically in the form of salves or creams.
